required_teams.team_description: Evacuate participants, manage bottlenecks, prevent discriminatory segregation

inject_templates.template: Explosion at {venue}. Smoke, debris, casualties. Extent unknown. Blast radius unclear.
Conflicting reports. Possible second device. Suspect may have fled. Vehicle or pedestrian approach?
Emergency services delayed. Traffic congestion. Self-manage extended. Ambulance ETA unclear.
Secondary fire risk. Structural damage to nearby buildings. Cordon expansion may be needed.
Viral misinformation: false claims about perpetrator identity. Community tensions rising.

decision_branches.trigger_condition: when evacuation proceeds without demographic segregation
decision_branches.inject_template: Evacuation proceeds without segregation. All evacuees use same routes and assembly points.

decision_branches.trigger_condition: when evacuation team receives request to segregate by demographic
decision_branches.inject_template: Fearful resident requests segregation. Evacuation team must decide: comply or refuse.

decision_branches.trigger_condition: when media team submits first public statement
decision_branches.inject_template: Public statement submitted. Does it address misinformation? Verified facts?
